differential_diagnoses: Pleomorphic adenoma of the parapharyngeal space
next_steps: Immediate CT angiography (CTA) of the neck to rule out pseudoaneurysm
Stop all invasive procedures (aspiration, biopsy) until vascular imaging is complete
Otolaryngology/Vascular surgery consultation for potential surgical planning or endovascular management
Incision/biopsy only after vascular pathology is ruled out
Pathologic examination of tissue with immunohistochemistry if neoplasm or vasculitis is suspected
